summary: Live Game state 'PERFECT' - Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games or Home pages
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action: WHEN a live game has a pitcher who has not allowed any opposing batter to reach base for any reason (hit/walk/error) and the game has reached the 6th inning
steps.result: THEN the Blue ‘PERFECT GAME’ badge is not displayed on any game tile (hero, expanded, mini)
